title: LiveCaptionSegment
description: Firestore document schema for `live_captions/{roomId}/segments/{segmentId}`. Append-only, written by the captions server. Document ids are `{connectionStartMs}-{seq6}` and sort chronologically across reconnections; order by document id, not by `seq` (which resets per broadcaster connection).

seq.description: 1-based sequence number within one broadcaster connection.

srcLang.description: Short language code of the source utterance (e.g. ja, en).

ja.description: Japanese translation (or the source text when spoken in Japanese).

en.description: English translation (or the source text when spoken in English).

startMs.description: Utterance start offset in ms since the connection started.

endMs.description: Utterance end offset in ms since the connection started.
